summary: Completed Phase 5: Commands-Over-Skills Audit. Created docs/guidelines/mcp-vs-cli.md with decision rules and quick reference table. Fixed 4 offenders: removed detect_entropy MCP and harness skill run harness-hotspot-detector from codebase-cleanup, replaced run_security_scan MCP with harness check-security CLI in pre-commit-review and security-review.
learnings: The run_security_scan reference in harness-security-review line 31 describes when to SKIP the scan (changed-files mode scope adaptation), not when to invoke it -- this is not an offender
Prettier reformatted the guideline table to use consistent column widths -- plan content was correct but formatting was auto-adjusted
